effects.effect: Until the end of the next turn, you can play [BareBones Brigade] Support Action cards as Attack Action Cards.

effects.name: Bone Return
effects.effect: If this card is Discarded: Place this card into your FP Zone, then you can Apply Harden to a [Boney] Vivosaur you control.

effects.name: Boney Morph
effects.effect: Place this card into your FP Zone; Play 1 [Boney] Vivosaur from your Deck, rested.
